examples: He came to the party unasked.
She brought him, unasked, the relevant file.
His advice, offered to her unasked, was to stay home and make the best of things.
Whoopi Goldberg, unasked by the company, posted about it on her Facebook page.
And I saw them for what they were, the mirror image of the things that go unsaid: all the things that go unasked.
